all_findings.title: vsFTPd version 2.3.4 backdoor
all_findings.evidence: vsFTPd version 2.3.4 backdoor, this was reported on 2011-07-04.

version_analysis.message: vsftpd 2.3.4 is end-of-life (EOL: 2011). No longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.

cves.description: vsFTPd 2.3.4 backdoor — supply-chain compromise allows unauthenticated RCE via port 6200.
cves.patch: Remove vsftpd 2.3.4 immediately. Deploy vsftpd 3.0.5+.

cves.description: ALPACA cross-protocol attack affecting vsftpd.
cves.patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.

context.criticality_reason: File transfer — often transmits credentials in plaintext

reasons: Critical CVSS score of 10.0 — severe vulnerability present
Running an end-of-life version with no security patches

      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous

    References:

  Transport Layer Security (TLS) Protocol DHE_EXPORT Ciphers Downgrade MitM (Logjam)
    State: VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2015-4000  BID:74733
      The Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol contains a flaw that is
      triggered when handling Diffie-Hellman key exchanges defined with
      the DHE_EXPORT cipher. This may allow a man-in-the-middle attacker
      to downgrade the security of a TLS session to 512-bit export-grade
      cryptography, which is significantly weaker, allowing the attacker
      to more easily break the encryption and monitor or tamper with
      the encrypted stream.
    Disclosure date: 2015-5-19
    Check results:
      EXPORT-GRADE DH GROUP 1
            Cipher Suite: TLS_DHE_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: Unknown/Custom-generated
            Modulus Length: 512
            Generator Length: 8
            Public Key Length: 512
    References:
      https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/74733
      https://weakdh.org
      https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2015-4000
  
  Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Insufficient Group Strength
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use Diffie-Hellman groups
      of insufficient strength, especially those using one of a few commonly
      shared groups, may be susceptible to passive eavesdropping attacks.

all_findings.title: Slowloris DOS attack
all_findings.evidence: Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold

probed.raw_response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Date: Sun, 28 Jun 2026 19:52:49 GMT
Server: Apache/2.2.8 (Ubuntu) DAV/2
X-Powered-By: PHP/5.2.4-2ubuntu5.10
Content-Length: 891
Connection: close
Content-Type: text/html

version_analysis.message: Apache httpd 2.2.8 is end-of-life (EOL: 2018). No longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Slowloris DoS: partial HTTP requests keep connections open, exhausting server resources.
cves.patch: Enable mod_reqtimeout / RequestReadTimeout. Use nginx or a reverse proxy with timeout controls.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

context.criticality_reason: Web service — attack surface depends on the application

reasons: Critical CVSS score of 9.8 — severe vulnerability present
Running an end-of-life version with no security patches
5 known CVEs mapped to this service

cves.description: Backdoor in vsftpd 2.3.4 — supply-chain compromise.
cves.patch: Remove vsftpd 2.3.4 immediately. Deploy vsftpd 3.0.5+.

cves.description: SMBGhost: SMBv3 buffer overflow, unauthenticated RCE on Windows 10/Server 2019.
cves.patch: Apply KB4551762. Disable SMBv3 compression as interim mitigation.

cves.description: Buffer overflow in BSD telnetd — pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Disable telnet immediately. Replace with SSH.

cves.description: Java RMI server allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
cves.patch: Disable RMI registry. Restrict port 1099. Upgrade to Java 7u2+.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: Path traversal and RCE in Apache 2.4.49. Files readable outside docroot.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.51 or later immediately.

cves.description: Incomplete fix for CVE-2021-41773 in Apache 2.4.50.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.51 or later.

cves.description: HTTP Request Smuggling in Apache mod_proxy.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.54 or later.

cves.description: Unauthenticated RCE in Jenkins via Stapler URL routing.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Jenkins 2.154 / LTS 2.138.4.

cves.description: EternalBlue: SMBv1 remote code execution, exploited by WannaCry.
cves.patch: Apply MS17-010. Disable SMBv1. Block port 445 at perimeter.

cves.description: BlueKeep: pre-auth RCE in Windows RDP — wormable.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft patch KB4499175. Disable RDP or put behind VPN.

cves.description: DejaBlue: second BlueKeep-class pre-auth RDP RCE.
cves.patch: Apply August 2019 Microsoft patch Tuesday updates.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

cves.description: Integer overflow in Redis Lua scripting — DoS / RCE.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Redis 3.0.6+.

cves.description: ALPACA cross-protocol attack affecting vsftpd.
cves.patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.

  Anonymous Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange MitM Vulnerability
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous
      Diffie-Hellman key exchange only provide protection against passive
      eavesdropping, and are vulnerable to active man-in-the-middle attacks
      which could completely compromise the confidentiality and integrity
      of any data exchanged over the resulting session.
    Check results:
      ANONYMOUS DH GROUP 1
            Cipher Suite: TLS_DH_anon_WITH_RC4_128_MD5
            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: postfix builtin
            Modulus Length: 1024
            Generator Length: 8
            Public Key Length: 1024
    References:
      https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2246.txt
  
  Transport Layer Security (TLS) Protocol DHE_EXPORT Ciphers Downgrade MitM (Logjam)
    State: VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2015-4000  BID:74733
      The Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol contains a flaw that is
      triggered when handling Diffie-Hellman key exchanges defined with
      the DHE_EXPORT cipher. This may allow a man-in-the-middle attacker
      to downgrade the security of a TLS session to 512-bit export-grade
      cryptography, which is significantly weaker, allowing the attacker
      to more easily break the encryption and monitor or tamper with
      the encrypted stream.
    Disclosure date: 2015-5-19
    Check results:
      EXPORT-GRADE DH GROUP 1
            Cipher Suite: TLS_DHE_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: Unknown/Custom-generated
            Modulus Length: 512
            Generator Length: 8
            Public Key Length: 512
    References:
      https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/74733
      https://weakdh.org
      https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2015-4000
  
  Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Insufficient Group Strength
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use Diffie-Hellman groups
      of insufficient strength, especially those using one of a few commonly
      shared groups, may be susceptible to passive eavesdropping attacks.

            Public Key Length: 1024

  Slowloris DOS attack
    State: LIKELY VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2007-6750
      Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold
      them open as long as possible.  It accomplishes this by opening connections to
      the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves
      the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.

version_analysis.message: Apache httpd 2.2.8 is end-of-life (EOL: 2018). No longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Slowloris DoS: partial HTTP requests keep connections open, exhausting server resources.
cves.patch: Enable mod_reqtimeout / RequestReadTimeout. Use nginx or a reverse proxy with timeout controls.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

cves.patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.

      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous
      Diffie-Hellman key exchange only provide protection against passive

      which could completely compromise the confidentiality and integrity

    References:

  Transport Layer Security (TLS) Protocol DHE_EXPORT Ciphers Downgrade MitM (Logjam)
    State: VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2015-4000  BID:74733
      The Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol contains a flaw that is
      triggered when handling Diffie-Hellman key exchanges defined with
      the DHE_EXPORT cipher. This may allow a man-in-the-middle attacker
      to downgrade the security of a TLS session to 512-bit export-grade
      cryptography, which is significantly weaker, allowing the attacker
      to more easily break the encryption and monitor or tamper with
      the encrypted stream.
    Disclosure date: 2015-5-19
    Check results:
      EXPORT-GRADE DH GROUP 1
            Cipher Suite: TLS_DHE_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: Unknown/Custom-generated
            Modulus Length: 512
            Generator Length: 8
            Public Key Length: 512
    References:
      https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/74733
      https://weakdh.org
      https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2015-4000
  
  Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Insufficient Group Strength
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use Diffie-Hellman groups
      of insufficient strength, especially those using one of a few commonly
      shared groups, may be susceptible to passive eavesdropping attacks.

all_findings.title: Slowloris DOS attack
all_findings.evidence: Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold

probed.raw_response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Date: Sun, 28 Jun 2026 19:52:49 GMT
Server: Apache/2.2.8 (Ubuntu) DAV/2
X-Powered-By: PHP/5.2.4-2ubuntu5.10
Content-Length: 891
Connection: close
Content-Type: text/html

version_analysis.message: Apache httpd 2.2.8 is end-of-life (EOL: 2018). No longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Slowloris DoS: partial HTTP requests keep connections open, exhausting server resources.
cves.patch: Enable mod_reqtimeout / RequestReadTimeout. Use nginx or a reverse proxy with timeout controls.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

context.criticality_reason: Web service — attack surface depends on the application

reasons: Critical CVSS score of 9.8 — severe vulnerability present

cves.description: Backdoor in vsftpd 2.3.4 — supply-chain compromise.
cves.patch: Remove vsftpd 2.3.4 immediately. Deploy vsftpd 3.0.5+.

cves.description: SMBGhost: SMBv3 buffer overflow, unauthenticated RCE on Windows 10/Server 2019.
cves.patch: Apply KB4551762. Disable SMBv3 compression as interim mitigation.

cves.description: Buffer overflow in BSD telnetd — pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Disable telnet immediately. Replace with SSH.

cves.description: Java RMI server allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
cves.patch: Disable RMI registry. Restrict port 1099. Upgrade to Java 7u2+.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: Path traversal and RCE in Apache 2.4.49. Files readable outside docroot.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.51 or later immediately.

cves.description: Incomplete fix for CVE-2021-41773 in Apache 2.4.50.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.51 or later.

cves.description: HTTP Request Smuggling in Apache mod_proxy.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.54 or later.

cves.description: Unauthenticated RCE in Jenkins via Stapler URL routing.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Jenkins 2.154 / LTS 2.138.4.

cves.description: EternalBlue: SMBv1 remote code execution, exploited by WannaCry.
cves.patch: Apply MS17-010. Disable SMBv1. Block port 445 at perimeter.

cves.description: BlueKeep: pre-auth RCE in Windows RDP — wormable.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft patch KB4499175. Disable RDP or put behind VPN.

cves.description: DejaBlue: second BlueKeep-class pre-auth RDP RCE.
cves.patch: Apply August 2019 Microsoft patch Tuesday updates.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

cves.description: Integer overflow in Redis Lua scripting — DoS / RCE.

  Slowloris DOS attack
    State: LIKELY VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2007-6750

      them open as long as possible.  It accomplishes this by opening connections to
      the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves
      the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.

  Anonymous Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange MitM Vulnerability
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous
      Diffie-Hellman key exchange only provide protection against passive
      eavesdropping, and are vulnerable to active man-in-the-middle attacks
      which could completely compromise the confidentiality and integrity
      of any data exchanged over the resulting session.
    Check results:
      ANONYMOUS DH GROUP 1
            Cipher Suite: TLS_DH_anon_WITH_RC4_128_MD5
            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: postfix builtin
            Modulus Length: 1024
            Generator Length: 8
            Public Key Length: 1024
    References:
      https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2246.txt
  
  Transport Layer Security (TLS) Protocol DHE_EXPORT Ciphers Downgrade MitM (Logjam)
    State: VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2015-4000  BID:74733
      The Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol contains a flaw that is
      triggered when handling Diffie-Hellman key exchanges defined with
      the DHE_EXPORT cipher. This may allow a man-in-the-middle attacker
      to downgrade the security of a TLS session to 512-bit export-grade
      cryptography, which is significantly weaker, allowing the attacker
      to more easily break the encryption and monitor or tamper with
      the encrypted stream.
    Disclosure date: 2015-5-19
    Check results:
      EXPORT-GRADE DH GROUP 1
            Cipher Suite: TLS_DHE_RSA_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA
            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: Unknown/Custom-generated
            Modulus Length: 512
            Generator Length: 8
            Public Key Length: 512
    References:
      https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/74733
      https://weakdh.org
      https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2015-4000
  
  Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Insufficient Group Strength
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use Diffie-Hellman groups
      of insufficient strength, especially those using one of a few commonly
      shared groups, may be susceptible to passive eavesdropping attacks.

            Modulus Type: Safe prime
            Modulus Source: postfix builtin

            Public Key Length: 1024

    State: LIKELY VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2007-6750
      Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold
      them open as long as possible.  It accomplishes this by opening connections to
      the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves
      the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.

version_analysis.message: Apache httpd 2.2.8 is end-of-life (EOL: 2018). No longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Slowloris DoS: partial HTTP requests keep connections open, exhausting server resources.
cves.patch: Enable mod_reqtimeout / RequestReadTimeout. Use nginx or a reverse proxy with timeout controls.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

cves.patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.

      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous
      Diffie-Hellman key exchange only provide protection against passive

      which could completely compromise the confidentiality and integrity

  Transport Layer Security (TLS) Protocol DHE_EXPORT Ciphers Downgrade MitM (Logjam)
    State: VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2015-4000  BID:74733
      The Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol contains a flaw that is
      triggered when handling Diffie-Hellman key exchanges defined with
      the DHE_EXPORT cipher. This may allow a man-in-the-middle attacker
      to downgrade the security of a TLS session to 512-bit export-grade
      cryptography, which is significantly weaker, allowing the attacker
      to more easily break the encryption and monitor or tamper with
      the encrypted stream.
    Disclosure date: 2015-5-19
    Check results:
      EXPORT-GRADE DH GROUP 1

            Modulus Type: Safe prime

            Public Key Length: 512
    References:
      https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/74733
      https://weakdh.org
      https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2015-4000
  
  Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Insufficient Group Strength
    State: VULNERABLE
      Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use Diffie-Hellman groups
      of insufficient strength, especially those using one of a few commonly
      shared groups, may be susceptible to passive eavesdropping attacks.

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Date: Sun, 28 Jun 2026 19:52:49 GMT
Server: Apache/2.2.8 (Ubuntu) DAV/2
X-Powered-By: PHP/5.2.4-2ubuntu5.10
Content-Length: 891
Connection: close

version_analysis.message: Apache httpd 2.2.8 is end-of-life (EOL: 2018). No longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Slowloris DoS: partial HTTP requests keep connections open, exhausting server resources.
cves.patch: Enable mod_reqtimeout / RequestReadTimeout. Use nginx or a reverse proxy with timeout controls.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

cves.patch: Remove vsftpd 2.3.4 immediately. Deploy vsftpd 3.0.5+.

cves.description: SMBGhost: SMBv3 buffer overflow, unauthenticated RCE on Windows 10/Server 2019.
cves.patch: Apply KB4551762. Disable SMBv3 compression as interim mitigation.

cves.description: Buffer overflow in BSD telnetd — pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Disable telnet immediately. Replace with SSH.

cves.description: Java RMI server allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
cves.patch: Disable RMI registry. Restrict port 1099. Upgrade to Java 7u2+.

cves.description: mod_mime buffer overread in Apache 2.2.x — allows remote code execution.
cves.patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.

cves.description: Path traversal and RCE in Apache 2.4.49. Files readable outside docroot.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.51 or later immediately.

cves.description: Incomplete fix for CVE-2021-41773 in Apache 2.4.50.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.51 or later.

cves.description: HTTP Request Smuggling in Apache mod_proxy.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.54 or later.

cves.description: Unauthenticated RCE in Jenkins via Stapler URL routing.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Jenkins 2.154 / LTS 2.138.4.

cves.description: EternalBlue: SMBv1 remote code execution, exploited by WannaCry.
cves.patch: Apply MS17-010. Disable SMBv1. Block port 445 at perimeter.

cves.description: BlueKeep: pre-auth RCE in Windows RDP — wormable.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft patch KB4499175. Disable RDP or put behind VPN.

cves.description: DejaBlue: second BlueKeep-class pre-auth RDP RCE.
cves.patch: Apply August 2019 Microsoft patch Tuesday updates.

cves.description: ProxyLogon: SSRF in Microsoft Exchange used for pre-auth RCE.
cves.patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.

cves.description: Apache 2.2 Range header DoS (Apache Killer). Server exhausted with overlapping ranges.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.2.21+ or deploy mod_reqtimeout. Prefer 2.4.x.

cves.description: Optionsbleed — Apache HTTP OPTIONS method leaks data from server memory.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Apache 2.4.28 or later. Apache 2.2 is end-of-life.

cves.description: Integer overflow in Redis Lua scripting — DoS / RCE.
cves.patch: Upgrade to Redis 3.0.6+.

cves.description: ALPACA cross-protocol attack affecting vsftpd.
cves.patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.

  Slowloris DOS attack
    State: LIKELY VULNERABLE
    IDs:  CVE:CVE-2007-6750
      Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold

      the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.

findings.what_was_found: Port 21/tcp is open running FTP (vsftpd 2.3.4)
findings.why_it_matters: File transfer — often transmits credentials in plaintext
findings.version_status: vsftpd 2.3.4 is end-of-life and no longer receives security patches. Replace immediately.
top_cves: CVE-2011-2523 (CVSS 10.0, CRITICAL): vsFTPd 2.3.4 backdoor — supply-chain compromise allows unauthenticated RCE via port 6200.
CVE-2021-3618 (CVSS 7.4, HIGH): ALPACA cross-protocol attack affecting vsftpd.
findings.risk_explanation: Risk classified as CRITICAL (score 8.5/10). Critical CVSS score of 10.0 — severe vulnerability present Service criticality is high Running an end-of-life version with no security patches Host has high overall exposure 2 known CVE(s) mapped
guidance: Upgrade FTP to the latest stable version immediately.
Replace FTP with SFTP or SCP — FTP transmits credentials in plaintext.
If FTP is required, restrict access to known IP ranges.
Disable anonymous FTP login.
Patch: Remove vsftpd 2.3.4 immediately. Deploy vsftpd 3.0.5+.
Patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.

findings.what_was_found: Port 22/tcp is open running SSH (OpenSSH 4.7p1 Debian 8ubuntu1)
findings.why_it_matters: Remote administration — high-value target
findings.version_status: OpenSSH 4.7p1 Debian 8ubuntu1 is outdated. Upgrade recommended.
findings.risk_explanation: Risk classified as MEDIUM (score 4.0/10). Service criticality is high Version is outdated Host has high overall exposure
guidance: Upgrade SSH to the latest stable version immediately.
Disable root SSH login (set PermitRootLogin no in sshd_config).
Use SSH key-based authentication instead of passwords.
Restrict SSH access by IP using AllowUsers or firewall rules.

defensive_guidance: Upgrade FTP to the latest stable version immediately.
Replace FTP with SFTP or SCP — FTP transmits credentials in plaintext.
If FTP is required, restrict access to known IP ranges.
Disable anonymous FTP login.
Patch: Remove vsftpd 2.3.4 immediately. Deploy vsftpd 3.0.5+.
Patch: Enable strict TLS SNI. Upgrade to vsftpd 3.0.5.
Upgrade SSH to the latest stable version immediately.
Disable root SSH login (set PermitRootLogin no in sshd_config).
Use SSH key-based authentication instead of passwords.
Restrict SSH access by IP using AllowUsers or firewall rules.
Disable Telnet immediately — it transmits all data including passwords in plaintext.
Replace with SSH.
Patch: Disable DHE_EXPORT ciphers. Use 2048-bit+ DH groups. Upgrade TLS libraries.
Patch: Disable SSLv3. Enforce TLS 1.2+. Apply vendor patches.
Upgrade DOMAIN to the latest stable version immediately.
Restrict DNS zone transfers to authorised secondary servers only.
Enable DNSSEC for DNS integrity.
Rate-limit DNS queries to mitigate amplification attacks.
Upgrade HTTP to the latest stable version immediately.
Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
Review the web application for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Remove server version banners from HTTP response headers.
Patch: Apache 2.2 is EOL. Upgrade to Apache 2.4.26 or later immediately.
Patch: Apply Microsoft Exchange cumulative update patches from March 2021.
Patch: Apply KB4551762. Disable SMBv3 compression as interim mitigation.
Patch: Upgrade to Samba 4.6.4, 4.5.10, 4.4.14+. Add 'nt pipe support = no' as workaround.
Patch: Disable RMI registry. Restrict port 1099 with firewall. Upgrade to Java 7u2+.
Patch: Disable telnet immediately. Replace with SSH.
Upgrade MYSQL to the latest stable version immediately.
Bind MySQL to localhost or internal IP only (not 0.0.0.0).
Disable remote root login. Use application-specific DB accounts.
Enable MySQL audit logging.
Patch: Upgrade to MySQL 5.5.24 or later.
Port 3306 should not be publicly accessible. Restrict via firewall to authorised hosts only.
Patch: Upgrade distcc to version > 3.1. Restrict distccd access with --allow firewall rules.
Port 5432 should not be publicly accessible. Restrict via firewall to authorised hosts only.
Patch: See https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2010-2075
Patch: Enable mod_reqtimeout / RequestReadTimeout. Use nginx or a reverse proxy with timeout controls.

soplib_findings.description: HTTP TRACE method is enabled — allows cross-site tracing (XST), which can be used to steal cookies/headers via reflected JavaScript despite httpOnly protections.

misconfig_findings.name: telnet_open
misconfig_findings.description: Telnet service is open — credentials and all traffic are sent in cleartext, trivially interceptable.
misconfig_findings.remediation: Disable the Telnet service entirely and use SSH instead. If Telnet must remain for legacy reasons, restrict access to a management VLAN.

misconfig_findings.name: http-trace
misconfig_findings.description: HTTP TRACE method is enabled — allows cross-site tracing (XST), which can be used to steal cookies/headers via reflected JavaScript despite httpOnly protections.
misconfig_findings.remediation: Disable the HTTP TRACE method (Apache: `TraceEnable Off`; IIS: remove TRACE via URLScan/Request Filtering) to prevent cross-site tracing (XST).

misconfig_findings.name: http-csrf
misconfig_findings.description: 7 form(s) without anti-CSRF tokens found during spidering — an attacker could trick an authenticated user into submitting unintended requests.
misconfig_findings.remediation: Add a unique, per-session anti-CSRF token to every state-changing form and validate it server-side on submission; reject requests missing or mismatching the token.

misconfig_findings.name: http-enum
misconfig_findings.description: Directory/file enumeration exposed 7 potentially sensitive path(s): /tikiwiki/ (Tikiwiki); /test/ (Test page); /phpinfo.php (Possible information file); /phpMyAdmin/ (phpMyAdmin); /doc/ (Potentially interesting directory w/ listing on 'apache/2.2.8 (ubuntu) dav/2'); /icons/ (Potentially interesting folder w/ directory listing); /index/ (Potentially interesting folder)
misconfig_findings.evidence: /tikiwiki/ (Tikiwiki); /test/ (Test page); /phpinfo.php (Possible information file); /phpMyAdmin/ (phpMyAdmin); /doc/ (Potentially interesting directory w/ listing on 'apache/2.2.8 (ubuntu) dav/2'); /icons/ (Potentially interesting folder w/ directory listing); /index/ (Potentially interesting folder)
misconfig_findings.remediation: Remove or restrict access to exposed admin panels, leftover CMS/test installs, and info-disclosure files (e.g. phpinfo.php); disable directory listing (Apache: `Options -Indexes`).

misconfig_findings.name: rexec_open
misconfig_findings.description: rexec service is open (port 512) — allows remote command execution with credentials transmitted in cleartext. More dangerous than Telnet: disables host-based authentication by default.
misconfig_findings.remediation: Disable the rexec service (port 512): `systemctl disable rexec`, remove netkit-rsh/rsh-server packages. Replace with SSH for all remote command execution.

misconfig_findings.name: rlogin_open
misconfig_findings.description: rlogin service is open (port 513) — transmits all session data and credentials in cleartext. Equivalent security risk to Telnet (port 23).
misconfig_findings.remediation: Disable the rlogin service (port 513): `systemctl disable rlogin`, remove netkit-rlogin packages. Replace with SSH for all remote access.

misconfig_findings.name: bindshell_open
misconfig_findings.description: Port 1524/tcp is running an unauthenticated root-level shell (bindshell). Any network connection to this port receives an interactive root shell with no credentials required. Immediate isolation required.
misconfig_findings.evidence: Port 1524/tcp open — service: bindshell metasploitable root shell
misconfig_findings.remediation: Immediately isolate this host from the network. Port is running an open root shell (bindshell), which is an unauthenticated backdoor. Rebuild the system from a clean image.

misconfig_findings.name: http-csrf
misconfig_findings.description: 5 form(s) without anti-CSRF tokens found during spidering — an attacker could trick an authenticated user into submitting unintended requests.
misconfig_findings.remediation: Add a unique, per-session anti-CSRF token to every state-changing form and validate it server-side on submission; reject requests missing or mismatching the token.

misconfig_findings.name: http-enum
misconfig_findings.description: Directory/file enumeration exposed 27 potentially sensitive path(s): /admin/ (Possible admin folder); /admin/index.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/login.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/admin.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/account.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/admin_login.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/home.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/admin-login.html (Possible admin folder)…
misconfig_findings.evidence: /admin/ (Possible admin folder); /admin/index.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/login.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/admin.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/account.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/admin_login.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/home.html (Possible admin folder); /admin/admin-login.html (Possible admin folder)…
misconfig_findings.remediation: Remove or restrict access to exposed admin panels, leftover CMS/test installs, and info-disclosure files (e.g. phpinfo.php); disable directory listing (Apache: `Options -Indexes`).

misconfig_findings.name: http-cookie-flags
misconfig_findings.description: Session cookie(s) missing HttpOnly flag: session cookie. JavaScript can read these tokens — XSS exploits can lead to session hijacking even when other XSS mitigations are in place.
misconfig_findings.evidence:
/admin/: 
    JSESSIONID: 
      httponly flag not set
  /admin/admin_login.html: 
    JSESSIONID: 
      httponly flag not set
  /admin/controlpanel.html: 
    JSESSIONID: 
      httponly flag not set
  /admin/index.jsp: 
    JSESSIONID: 
      httponly flag not set
  /admin/admin-login.jsp: 
    J
misconfig_findings.remediation: Set the HttpOnly flag on all session cookies to prevent JavaScript access. In Java/Tomcat: `context.setUseHttpOnly(true)` or add `httpOnly=true` to session-config in web.xml.
